scripts.guard:test: npm run guard:test:core && npm run guard:test:e2e
scripts.guard:test:core: node --test --experimental-strip-types tests/segment/segment-detection.test.ts tests/quantity/quantity-engine.test.ts tests/quantity/product-quantity-rule-upsert.test.ts tests/visibility/product-visibility.test.ts tests/visibility/storefront-visibility.server.test.ts tests/visibility/margin-guard-visibility.loader.test.ts tests/pricing/b2b-override-pricing.test.ts tests/pricing/tier-pricing.test.ts tests/pricing/pricing-config-resolution.test.ts tests/margin/global-floor-policy.test.ts tests/margin/mvp1-readiness.test.ts tests/cart/cart-validation-blocking.test.ts tests/cart/cart-validation-function-extension.test.ts tests/cart/cart-validation-total-amount-integration.test.ts tests/components/admin-catalog-picker.helpers.test.ts tests/discount/discount-function-enforcement.test.ts tests/discount/coupon-segment-validation.test.ts tests/discount/discount-stacking.test.ts tests/discount/discount-identity.test.ts tests/discount/advanced-discount-orchestration.test.ts tests/discount/advanced-orchestration.test.ts tests/contracts/b2b-tag-activation-contract.test.ts tests/contracts/cart-runtime-coupon-enforcement-contract.test.ts tests/contracts/ops-config-hardening.test.ts tests/contracts/repo-cleanup-function-stubs.test.ts tests/contracts/shopify-function-config-contract.test.ts tests/contracts/shopify-config-contract.test.ts tests/routes/app-settings-catalog-picker.contract.test.ts tests/routes/cart-validate-admin-endpoint.test.ts tests/routes/catalog-search-route.test.ts tests/routes/violations-sync-mode.test.ts tests/services/activation-cart-validation-activation.test.ts tests/services/discount-function-activation.test.ts tests/services/admin-catalog-search.server.test.ts tests/services/advanced-discount-orchestration.integrity.test.ts tests/services/violation-shared-margin-source-of-truth.test.ts tests/integration/function-runtime-config-compat.test.ts tests/integration/prisma-singleton-runtime.test.ts tests/webhooks/orders-create.test.ts tests/storefront/storefront-content.test.ts tests/e2e/auto-product-selection.test.ts
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy: npm run prisma:ensure-db && prisma migrate deploy
scripts.docker-start: npm run setup && npm run start
scripts.setup: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate:deploy
